diagrams.title: Two-Phase Locking Timeline
diagrams.description: Shows the two phases of 2PL with lock count over transaction lifetime
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental 2PL protocol structure and when locks can be acquired/released

diagrams.title: Lock Compatibility Matrix
diagrams.description: 2x2 matrix showing compatibility between S-lock and X-lock
elements: Requested: S, Held: X → Not Compatible
Requested: X, Held: S → Not Compatible
Requested: X, Held: X → Not Compatible
diagrams.purpose: Learn which lock combinations can coexist and understand lock request behavior

diagrams.title: Wait-For Graph for Deadlock Detection
diagrams.description: Directed graph showing which transactions are waiting for which other transactions
elements: Edge T1→T2 means T1 waiting for lock held by T2
Example: T1 holds A waits for B, T2 holds B waits for A
diagrams.purpose: Understand deadlock detection mechanism and visualize deadlock conditions

diagrams.title: Comparison of 2PL Variants
diagrams.description: Comparison chart showing lock holding behavior in Basic 2PL, Strict 2PL, and Rigorous 2PL
elements: Basic 2PL: X-locks released in shrinking phase
Rigorous 2PL: All locks held until commit
Timeline showing when each releases locks
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between 2PL variants and understand their cascade prevention properties
